validation.redirectUrisMinOne: At least one redirect URI is required
validation.signUpRoleRequired: Sign-up role is required when allow sign-up is enabled.

notFound.title: Page Not Found
notFound.description: The page you're looking for doesn't exist or has been moved. Check the URL or navigate back to safety.

forbidden.title: Access Denied
forbidden.description: You don't have permission to access this resource. Please contact your administrator if you believe this is a mistake.
forbidden.helpText: If you think this is an error, please contact your organization administrator.

session.expiredDescription: Your session has expired or been revoked. Redirecting to login...

app.title: Grant
app.description: A modern authorization platform for individuals and organizations.

demo.bannerMessageWithSchedule: This is a free demo instance. Data (accounts, projects, etc.) may be reset periodically according to the schedule: {schedule}.
demo.bannerMessageWithoutSchedule: This is a free demo instance. Data (accounts, projects, etc.) may be reset periodically.

resetIncludes.title: The following data is cleared on each reset:

welcome.title: Welcome to Grant
welcome.description: A modern authorization platform for individuals and organizations. Manage user access, permissions and roles for your applications with simplicity.

passwordPolicy.title: Password requirements
passwordPolicy.description: Use at least 6 characters. For stronger security we recommend a mix of letters, numbers and symbols.

githubSignIn.title: Sign in with GitHub
githubSignIn.description: New users can create an account with GitHub in one click. Existing users will link their GitHub identity to sign in.

forgotPassword.title: Forgot your password?
forgotPassword.description: Use the link below the form to request a secure reset link sent to your email.

accountType.title: Account type
accountType.description: Choose Personal for solo use or Organization for teams. You can create or join organizations later.

passwordStrength.title: Strong password
passwordStrength.description: The indicator shows how strong your password is. A mix of length, letters, numbers and symbols improves security.

verification.title: Email verification
verification.description: After signing up you may need to verify your email before full access. Check your inbox for the link.

checkInbox.title: Check your inbox
checkInbox.description: If an account exists for that email, we send a reset link. Check spam if you don't see it.

noEmail.title: No account?
noEmail.description: For security we don't reveal whether an email is registered. Try signing up if you're new.

linkExpiry.title: Link expires soon
linkExpiry.description: Each verification link is valid for a short time (a few minutes). If it expires, go to the login page and use "Resend verification email" to get a new one.

alreadyUsed.title: Link already used?
alreadyUsed.description: If you already clicked the link and verified your email, you're all set—use "Go to dashboard" to continue. The link only works once for security.

checkSpam.title: Can't find the email?
checkSpam.description: Check your spam or junk folder. The message might take a minute to arrive. If you still don't see it, go to the login page and request a new verification email.

resendLink.title: Need a new link?
resendLink.description: You can request a new verification email from the login page. Enter your email and choose "Resend verification email" if the option is available.

linkFromEmail.title: Link from your email
linkFromEmail.description: You opened this page from the password reset email we sent you. Enter a new password below; the link is valid for a limited time. If you didn't request a reset, you can ignore the email or change your password to stay secure.

linkExpired.title: Link expired or invalid?
linkExpired.description: Reset links expire after a set time. If yours doesn't work or has expired, go to the "Forgot password" page and request a new reset link. We'll send another email to your address.

strongPassword.title: Choose a strong password
strongPassword.description: Use a mix of letters, numbers, and symbols, and avoid reusing a password you've used before. The strength indicator helps you meet the requirements. You'll use this password to sign in from now on.

afterReset.title: After resetting
afterReset.description: Once you've set your new password, use "Continue to login" to sign in with your email and the new password. If you see an error, the link may have expired—request a new one from the Forgot password page.

whatIsThis.title: What is this invitation?
whatIsThis.description: You were invited to join an organization. Accept to get the role and access, or decline if you're not interested. You must be signed in to accept; use the same email address you were invited with.

linkExpired.title: Invitation expired?
linkExpired.description: Invitations are valid for a limited time (for example, 7 days). If yours has expired, ask the person who invited you to send a new invitation from the organization settings.

alreadyAccepted.title: Already accepted?
alreadyAccepted.description: If you already accepted this invitation, you're all set. Use "Go to organization" to open the organization, or find it from your dashboard and switch to that workspace.

signInRequired.title: Sign in to accept
signInRequired.description: You need to be signed in to accept an invitation. Sign in with the email you were invited with, or register first if you don't have an account. After signing in you'll return here to complete the acceptance.

whatIsThis.title: What is this?
whatIsThis.description: You're signing in to a project app that uses Grant for authentication. Choose GitHub or email to continue. The app may request access to certain data; you'll see and approve that on the next screen if needed.

requestedScopes.title: Requested permissions
requestedScopes.description: The list above shows what this app is asking to access (e.g. profile, email). You can allow or deny these on the consent screen after you sign in. Only grant access if you trust the app.

trustApp.title: Is it safe?
trustApp.description: Only sign in if you trust the app and its publisher. You stay in control: you can deny access on the consent screen or revoke it later from your account settings.

linkFromEmail.title: Sign-in link by email
linkFromEmail.description: Enter the email address for your Grant account. We'll send a one-time sign-in link to that address. Use the same email you use for the main Grant platform so your identity is linked correctly.

checkInbox.title: Check your inbox
checkInbox.description: After submitting, check your email (and spam/junk folder) for the sign-in link. Click the link to complete sign-in for this app. The link expires after a short time for security.

sameEmail.title: Use your Grant email
sameEmail.description: Use the same email you use to sign in to the Grant platform. If you don't have an account yet, you may need to register first from the main login page, then return here to sign in to the app.

reviewPermissions.title: Review before allowing
reviewPermissions.description: This screen shows exactly what the app wants to access. Read the list and only click Allow if you're comfortable with those permissions. You can deny to cancel and the app won't get access.

allowOrDeny.title: Allow or deny
allowOrDeny.description: Allow grants the app the permissions listed above and redirects you back to the app. Deny cancels the request and the app will not receive access. You can revoke access later from your account if you change your mind.

revokeLater.title: Change your mind later?
revokeLater.description: You can revoke this app's access at any time from your account or profile settings. Revoking stops the app from using your data; you can always sign in again later to re-authorize if needed.

whyAuthenticator.title: Why am I asked for a code?
whyAuthenticator.description: Multi-factor authentication adds a second step after your password. You prove you have your phone or authenticator app by entering a short code—so even if someone learns your password, they still can't sign in as you.

sixDigitCode.title: Where do I get the code?
sixDigitCode.description: Open your authenticator app (Google Authenticator, Microsoft Authenticator, Authy, 1Password, or similar), find the entry for this account, and type the 6-digit code shown. If you're setting up MFA for the first time, scan the QR code with your app first, then enter the code it generates to confirm.

recoveryCodes.title: Can't use your authenticator app?
recoveryCodes.description: If you lost your phone or can't open the app, use a one-time recovery code instead. Click "Use a recovery code" below the form, enter one of the codes you saved when you enabled MFA, and sign in. Each recovery code works only once—generate new codes in account settings when you run low.

troubleshooting.title: Code not accepted?
troubleshooting.description: Wait for a fresh code (they usually change every 30 seconds) and try again. Make sure your device's date and time are set automatically so codes stay in sync. Check that you're using the code for this account and that caps lock isn't on. If you recently reset MFA, use the new setup in your app.

username.label: Username
username.description: This will be your unique identifier. If left empty, it will be generated from your name.

popover.title: Username
popover.description: This will be your unique identifier. If left empty, it will be generated from your name.

autoGeneration.title: Auto-Generation
autoGeneration.description: Your username is automatically generated from your name. You can edit it anytime, but once you do, it won't auto-update when you change your name.

personal.title: Personal Account
personal.description: Perfect for individual users who want to manage their own projects and access control. Ideal for developers, freelancers, and personal projects.

organization.title: Organization Account
organization.description: Designed for teams and companies. Includes advanced features like team management, role-based access control, and centralized administration for multiple users and projects.

auth.validationErrors: Please check the form for validation errors

login.title: Sign In
login.description: Sign in to manage access for your projects
login.emailError: Please enter a valid email address
login.passwordError: Password must be at least 6 characters
login.verifyEmailDescription: Please verify your email to access all features

oauthErrors.accountCreationFailed: We couldn't complete sign-in. Please try again or use a different sign-in method.
oauthErrors.accountExists: An account with this sign-in method already exists. Try signing in with that method instead.
oauthErrors.signUpDisabled: Sign-up is disabled for this app. Please use an existing account or contact the app owner.
oauthErrors.invalidState: This sign-in link has expired or was already used. Please start the sign-in process again.
oauthErrors.userNotInProject: Your account is not a member of this app's project. Ask the project owner to add you, or use an account that has access.
oauthErrors.scopeResolutionFailed: We couldn't determine your access for this app. Please contact support.
oauthErrors.redirectUriInvalid: The app's redirect URL is invalid or not allowed. Please contact the app owner.
oauthErrors.oauthNotConfigured: Sign-in is not configured. Please contact support.
oauthErrors.githubUserInfoFailed: We couldn't get your GitHub information. Please try again.
oauthErrors.githubUnavailable: GitHub is temporarily unavailable. Please try again later.
oauthErrors.oauthError: Sign-in was cancelled or failed. Please try again.

register.title: Create Account
register.description: Create your account to start managing access for your projects
register.verifyEmailDescription: Please check your email and verify your account to access all features

forgotPassword.title: Reset Password
forgotPassword.description: Enter your email address and we'll send you a secure link to reset your password.
forgotPassword.emailSentDescription: Check your email for a link to reset your password.

resetPassword.title: Create New Password
resetPassword.description: Enter your new password below. Make sure it's strong and secure.

success.title: Password Reset Successfully
success.description: Your password has been reset. You can now log in with your new password.

error.title: Password Reset Failed
error.description: We couldn't reset your password. Please try again.

invalidToken.title: Invalid Reset Link
invalidToken.description: This password reset link is invalid or has expired. Please request a new one.

verifyEmail.title: Email Verification
verifyEmail.verifyingDescription: Please wait while we verify your email address
verifyEmail.successMessage: Your email has been verified successfully
verifyEmail.successDescription: Your email has been verified. You can now access all features.
verifyEmail.errorDescription: We couldn't verify your email. The link may have expired or is invalid.
verifyEmail.expiredTokenDescription: Your verification link has expired. Please log in again to receive a new verification email.
verifyEmail.missingTokenDescription: This verification link is invalid or missing required information.
verifyEmail.invalidOrUsedDescription: This verification link was already used or is invalid. If you've already verified your email, go to the dashboard. Otherwise, log in to request a new verification email.

resendVerification.title: Resend Verification Email
resendVerification.description: Enter your email to receive a new verification link
resendVerification.successMessage: Verification email has been sent successfully
resendVerification.successDescription: Check your inbox for the verification link

notifications.verificationWarning: Please verify your email to access all features. Your verification link will expire in {days} days.
notifications.verificationExpired: Your email verification has expired. Please request a new verification email.
notifications.sessionExpiredDescription: Your session has expired or been revoked. Redirecting to login...

featureGating.title: Email Verification Required
featureGating.description: Some features are restricted until you verify your email address. Below is a summary of what's available.

note.title: Note:
note.description: Personal account features remain accessible even without email verification. Organization-level features and account settings require verified email for security reasons.

validation.email: Please enter a valid email address
validation.password: Password must be at least 8 characters
validation.name: Name must be at least 2 characters
validation.username: Username must be at least 3 characters
validation.usernameUnique: This username is already taken. Please choose a different one.

callback.errorDescription: An error occurred during GitHub authentication. Please try again.

entry.requestingAccess: This app is requesting access to your account.

email.title: Sign in with email
email.description: Enter your email and we'll send you a sign-in link.
email.checkEmailDescription: We sent you a sign-in link. Click the link in the email to continue.

consent.title: Consent
consent.reviewPermissions: Review the permissions below and allow or deny access.

relay.complete: Sign-in complete. This window will close.
relay.noOpener: This page should be opened as a popup from the app.

mfaStepUp.title: Verification required
mfaStepUp.description: This action requires multi-factor authentication. Enter your authenticator code to continue.
mfaStepUp.invalidCode: Invalid authenticator code. Please try again.
mfaStepUp.invalidRecoveryCode: Invalid recovery code. Please try again.

noEnrollment.description: This action requires multi-factor authentication, but you don't have an authenticator device set up yet.
noEnrollment.alertDescription: Your organization requires MFA for this action. Set up an authenticator device in your security settings before you can continue.

settings.title: Settings
settings.description: Configure your account preferences and options

account.title: Account Information
account.description: View, switch between workspaces, and/or create complementary workspace

details.title: Account
details.description: View your workspace accounts, their features, and account IDs

information.title: Account Details
information.description: Update your account name and username

name.label: Account Name
name.description: This is your account's display name. It can be your personal name or your organization name.

username.label: Username
username.description: Your unique identifier across the platform. Must be at least 3 characters and can only contain lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens.

type.title: Account Type
type.description: Your account type determines the features available to you

personal.title: Personal Account Features
personal.feature1Description: Only you have access; projects are linked directly to your account.
personal.feature2Description: Full control over your account and its projects.
personal.feature3Description: No invitations or team roles; ideal for individual use.
personal.feature4Description: Projects are scoped to your account (account_projects); no organization layer.
personal.feature5Description: Ideal for side projects and individual development.

organization.title: Organization Account Features
organization.feature1Description: Invite users by email and assign roles (Owner, Admin, Dev, Viewer).
organization.feature2Description: Manage members, create projects, and control access.
organization.feature3Description: Organization contains projects and members; org roles apply to org projects.
organization.feature4Description: Owner (full control), Admin (teams and permissions), Dev (resources and roles), Viewer (read-only).
organization.feature5Description: Ideal for teams and business use.

complementary.title: Create a Complementary Workspace
complementary.description: You can also create a {type} workspace to access additional features.
complementary.dialogDescription: Are you sure you want to create a {type} workspace? This workspace will be separate from your current workspace.

immutable.title: Note:
immutable.description: Account type cannot be changed after creation for security and billing purposes.

notifications.createComplementaryAccountSuccessDescrip: Your new {type} account has been created. You can switch between accounts using the account switcher.

selection.title: Select Account
selection.description: Choose which account you want to manage

name.label: Display Name
name.description: This is your full name displayed across the platform.

avatar.title: Profile Picture
avatar.description: Upload a profile picture to personalize your account
avatar.comingSoon: Profile picture support is coming soon! You'll be able to upload a custom avatar to personalize your account.

upload.title: Upload Profile Picture
upload.description: Select an image, crop it to your liking, and upload it as your profile picture

dropzone.idle: Drag and drop an image here, or click to browse
dropzone.hint: Supported formats: JPG, PNG, GIF, WebP (max 5MB)

errors.invalidType: Invalid file type. Please use JPG, PNG, GIF, or WebP.
errors.fileTooLarge: File is too large. Maximum size is {maxSize}MB.
errors.readFailed: Failed to read the file. Please try again.
errors.uploadFailed: Failed to upload the image. Please try again.

security.title: Login & Security
security.description: Manage your authentication methods and security settings

authenticationMethods.title: Authentication Methods
authenticationMethods.description: Manage how you sign in to your account
authenticationMethods.cannotDisconnectLastMethod: Cannot disconnect your last authentication method. Please add another method first.
authenticationMethods.emailConnectError: Failed to add email authentication method
authenticationMethods.setPrimaryError: Failed to set primary authentication method

addEmailAuthMethod.title: Add Email Authentication Method
addEmailAuthMethod.description: Add an email address and password to sign in to your account

changePassword.title: Change Password
changePassword.description: Update your password to keep your account secure

activeSessions.title: Active Sessions
activeSessions.description: Manage your active login sessions across all devices
activeSessions.revokeConfirmDescription: Are you sure you want to revoke this session? The user will need to log in again on that device.
activeSessions.revokeCurrentSessionDescription: Are you sure you want to revoke your current session? You will be logged out immediately and redirected to the login page. You will need to log in again to continue.

devices.title: MFA devices
devices.removeLastDescription: Removing your last authenticator turns off MFA. Any unused recovery codes will be revoked.
devices.removeLastOrgPolicy: If your organization requires MFA for sensitive actions, those actions stay blocked until you set up MFA again.

enroll.title: Set up authenticator app
enroll.description: Create a new authenticator setup and verify it to activate.
enroll.infoDescription: Starting setup creates a new TOTP configuration. If one already exists, it will be replaced after you confirm with a valid code.

challenge.title: Multi-factor authentication
challenge.description: Verify your authenticator app code to continue.

recovery.title: Recovery codes
recovery.description: Generate one-time recovery codes for account access fallback.
recovery.empty: No active recovery codes yet. Generate and store them securely.
recovery.oneTimeDescription: This is the only time we show the full list. Copy and store them somewhere safe before leaving this page.
recovery.metadataActive: You have {count} active recovery codes. Last generated: {date}.

preferences.title: Preferences
preferences.description: Configure your user interface and application preferences

theme.label: Theme
theme.description: Choose your preferred theme or match your system settings

language.title: Language & Region
language.label: Language
language.selectDescription: Choose your preferred language for the interface

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.comingSoonDescription: You'll be able to customize email notifications, in-app alerts, and notification frequency.

privacy.title: Privacy
privacy.description: Manage your privacy settings and data

dataExport.title: Data Export
dataExport.description: Download a copy of your account data
dataExport.info: You can request a copy of all your personal data stored in your account. This includes your account information, profile data, sessions, and activity history.
dataExport.loginRequired: You must be logged in to export your data
dataExport.downloadSuccess: Your data has been downloaded successfully

dataRetention.title: Data Retention
dataRetention.description: Learn about how we handle your data

active.title: Active Accounts
active.description: Data for active accounts is retained indefinitely while your account is in use. You can request data deletion at any time.

deleted.title: Deleted Accounts
deleted.description: When you delete your account, your data is marked for deletion and will be permanently removed after {days} days. During this period, you can restore your account.

backup.title: Backup & Recovery
backup.description: We maintain encrypted backups of your data for disaster recovery purposes. These backups are retained for up to 90 days after account deletion.

accountDeletion.title: Account Deletion
accountDeletion.description: Permanently delete your account and all associated data
accountDeletion.warning: This action cannot be undone. All your data will be permanently deleted.

consequences.title: What happens when you delete your account:
consequences.data: All your account data, projects, and settings will be permanently deleted
consequences.dataDescription: All your account data, projects, and settings will be permanently deleted
consequences.access: You will lose access to all organizations and projects you're a member of
consequences.accessDescription: You will lose access to all organizations and projects you're a member of
consequences.irreversible: This action is irreversible and cannot be undone

dialog.title: Delete Account
dialog.description: Are you absolutely sure you want to delete your account? This action cannot be undone and all your data will be permanently removed.
dialog.warning: Please confirm your user ID to proceed with account deletion.
dialog.userIdHint: Copy your user ID using the button above.
dialog.confirmUserIdHint: Enter your user ID above to confirm account deletion. This prevents accidental deletions.

accountDeletion.userIdMismatch: The entered user ID does not match your user ID. Please try again.
accountDeletion.loginRequired: You must be logged in to delete your account
accountDeletion.deleteSuccessDescription: Your account has been deleted successfully

invitations.title: Organization Invitation
invitations.description: You've been invited to join an organization
invitations.loadingDescription: Please wait while we verify your invitation

invalidToken.title: Invalid Invitation
invalidToken.description: This invitation link is invalid or has been revoked. Please contact the person who invited you for a new invitation.

expired.title: Invitation Expired
expired.description: This invitation has expired. Please contact the person who invited you for a new invitation.

alreadyAccepted.title: Invitation Already Accepted
alreadyAccepted.description: You have already accepted this invitation and are a member of this organization.

requiresLogin.title: Login Required
requiresLogin.description: Please log in or register with an organization account using the same email address as the invitation to accept this invitation.

requiresOrgAccount.title: Organization Account Required
requiresOrgAccount.description: You need to be logged in with an organization account to accept this invitation. Please switch to your organization account or log in with one.

ready.title: Accept Invitation
ready.description: You've been invited to join this organization. Review the details below and accept to become a member.

success.title: Invitation Accepted
success.description: You have successfully joined the organization!

error.title: Error Accepting Invitation
error.description: An error occurred while accepting the invitation. Please try again.

viewer.emptyDescription: The first signing key is created when an API key is exchanged for a token, or you can create one manually.

rotateDialog.title: Rotate signing key
rotateDialog.description: A new key will be generated and used for signing new tokens. Existing tokens remain valid until they expire. This action cannot be undone.
rotateDialog.createDescription: A new signing key will be generated for this project. It will be used to sign tokens when API keys are exchanged.
